description_long: This is an octagonal stone fountain featuring a central elevated pedestal with a large sculpted animal, likely a bear, seated atop. Surrounding the central figure are five smaller animal sculptures, each positioned on the wide rim of the basin, facing inward toward the center. The basin itself is broad and low, with a flat top surface and a recessed circular area in the middle, possibly for water collection or drainage. The stone surface shows signs of weathering, with a muted, mossy patina in some areas. The overall design is robust and monumental, with a focus on animal motifs and a symmetrical arrangement. There are no visible water jets or flowing water in the current state.
description: A large octagonal stone fountain with a central seated animal sculpture and five smaller animal figures arranged around the rim. The fountain has a weathered, monumental appearance with detailed animal motifs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central animal sculpture facing forward, with all five smaller animal figures clearly visible around the rim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the central animal and the arrangement of the smaller figures, with more detail on the left-side animals.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central animal and the backs of the surrounding figures, with the octagonal basin's depth more apparent.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the central animal in profile and the plaque or inscription on the basin's front face.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is adorned with detailed animal sculptures, including a large central seated bear and five smaller animal figures, all rendered in a stylized, robust manner. There is a plaque or inscription on one side of the basin, adding a commemorative or informational element.
attribute_basin_structure: The basin is octagonal, broad, and low, with a flat rim and a recessed central area. It features a single tier and has no visible compartments or divisions.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present; the fountain appears dry in all views.
